title: The RealReal (REAL) Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
text: The average price target for REAL (The RealReal, Inc.) is $18.19 with a high forecast of $20.00 and a low forecast of $16.00, based on multiple analyst sources. RealReal has 93.51% upside potential, based on the analysts' average price target. RealReal's analyst rating consensus is a strong buy. This is based on the ratings of 9 Wall Street analysts. RealReal is forecast to grow earnings and revenue by 92.3% and 9.8% per annum respectively while EPS is expected to grow by 94.4% per annum. New consensus forecast suggests the company will make a profit of US$29.8m in 2026, which represents a significant improvement from previous expectations. The RealReal issued earnings guidance for the first quarter of 2026, with expected total revenue in a range of $185 million to $189 million. Overall, analysts maintain a bullish outlook on REAL with consistent price targets and a strong buy rating across the coverage.
